root.name: Change circular bullets to numbered list on final slide
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent successfully changed the circular bullets on the final slide to numbered list items, without making unnecessary changes to other slides or content.

children.name: Bullet format changed from circular to numbered
children.description: Verifies that the bullet points on the final slide have been changed from circular bullets to numbered list format.

children.name: No extraneous changes made
children.description: Ensures that only the required changes were made and no unnecessary modifications were applied to other slides or content.

children.name: Other slides unchanged
children.description: Verifies that slides other than the final slide were not modified unnecessarily.

children.name: No unnecessary animations or transitions added
children.description: Ensures that no new animations or transitions were added during the bullet format change.

children.name: No other changes made to final slide
children.description: Ensures that no extraneous changes were made to the final slide.

children.name: Content preservation
children.description: Verifies that the text content and overall structure of the final slide were preserved during the bullet format change.

children.name: Text content preserved
children.description: Ensures that the actual text content of the bullet points was not altered, only the formatting.

metadata.task: Change the circular bullets on the final slide to numbered list items.
